nodes.label: Route handlers for the OpenAI-compatible API server.
Convert Pydantic ChatMessage objects to core Message objects.
Handle chat completion requests (streaming and non-streaming).
Stream agent response with EventBus events via SSE.
List locally installed models (Ollama).      Cloud models are not included here
Pull / download a model from the Ollama registry.
Hot-reload cloud API keys and (re-)initialize the cloud engine.      Called by t
Return savings summary compared to cloud providers.      Only includes telemetry
Clear all stored telemetry records.      Useful after updating token-counting me
Return server configuration: model, agent, engine.
Send a message to a channel.
Run a read-only security environment audit and return findings.
